creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Missing whitespace before ending doublequotes

-PLIST_SUB+=    NLS="@comment"
+PLIST_SUB+=    NLS="@comment "

produces "...unknown command '@commentshare/locale..."

How-To-Repeat: $ make install -DWITHOUT_NLS
[...]
--- binutils-register-install begins here ---
